goal.text: Revert the locally installed Codex superpowers brainstorming and dispatching-parallel-agents skills from compiled claw packages back to plain markdown skills without touching the other installed superpowers skills.

requirements.summary: Operate only on the installed local Codex superpowers plugin under `C:\Users\chany\.codex\plugins\cache\openai-curated\superpowers\d6169bef\skills`. Revert `brainstorming` and `dispatching-parallel-agents` to plain markdown skill form, preserving any helper files still referenced by the plain skill body.
acceptanceCriteria: The `brainstorming` and `dispatching-parallel-agents` folders no longer present claw template-backed entry surfaces.
Each reverted skill keeps a valid plain markdown `SKILL.md` based on the original fallback content.
Claw-only files are removed from those two skill folders when they are no longer needed.
Helper files still referenced by the plain markdown skill remain present.
Other installed superpowers skills remain untouched.

rules: Operate only on the installed local Codex superpowers plugin path.
Do not change claw-kit plugin files.
Limit the rollback to brainstorming and dispatching-parallel-agents.

references.why: Installed target skill folder to revert in place.
Installed target skill folder to revert in place.
